caption: A woman with her hair in a high blonde-tipped bun and wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt sits in a studio setting. She is positioned in front of a black microphone on a stand, facing slightly to the left as she speaks. Behind her is a white wall with a vertical yellow stripe. To her left, a black screen displays the red word "Johnson" above a white graphic. To her right, the red and white text "BOSS TALK 101" is visible, with smaller text below reading "by 11 Logo Studio". A circular logo containing the words "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appears on the left side of the scene. In the background, a small sign reads "Employee Only". Across the sequence, the woman remains in the same position, with slight changes in her facial expression and mouth movements as she talks.
